LAW AND MOTION 302, CLAIM OF EXEMPTION ON BEHALF OF GABRIELA CARRILLO IS GRANTED IN PART. COURT DETERMINES THAT DIRECT DEPOSIT PUBLIC BENEFITS/SOCIAL SECURITY ACCOUNT FUNDS HELD IN THE AMOUNT OF $1256.27 ARE IN EXCESS OF THE EXEMPT AMMOUNT, ARE PAYABLE TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR AND SHOULD BE RELEASED TO MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC. A WRITTEN ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: LAURA MARTINEZ, CSR #11332, BUS. TEL: 415-551-3745. (D302)

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARRILLO, GABRIELA $18,824.40 PRINCIPAL, $6,501.60 INTEREST, $389.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $25,715.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jul-13-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Attorney, Alisa J. Kim (510-736-6293), appears for plaintiff Midland Funding, LLC

No other appearance is made in this matter.

Claim Of Exemption on behalf of Gabriela Carrillo is GRANTED in part. Court determines that Direct Deposit Public Benefits/Social Security Account funds held in the amount of $1256.27 are in excess of the exempt ammount, are payable to the judgment creditor and should be released to Midland Funding, LLC. A written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Laura Martinez, CSR #11332, Bus. Tel: 415-551-3745. (D302)
